npc.pepel.fisherman.name: Fisherman
npc.pepel.fisherman.line1: Hey, traveler. Haven't seen anyone alive on this shore for a long time.
npc.pepel.fisherman.line2: If you're looking for people — head northeast. There's a village called Refuge.
npc.pepel.fisherman.line3: I'd go myself, but... fish don't catch themselves.
